title: Engineering New Repositories with Quality Gates

audience.description: Developers and technical leads who want reproducible new-project setup with high-signal style, lint, type, test, dead-code, security, sanitizer, and CI enforcement.
entryKnowledge: Use Git, a package manager, tests, and a hosted pull-request workflow in at least one programming language.
deviceConstraints: Desktop recommended; labs use local configuration files and safe fixture repositories.
accessibilityAssumptions: All equations, diagrams, tables, terminal traces, and code examples require equivalent structured text and full keyboard operation.

placementEvidence: A placement review or prior artifact must demonstrate this entry skill: Use Git, a package manager, tests, and a hosted pull-request workflow in at least one programming language.
completionEvidence: Complete and defend all 4 stakeholder projects against their acceptance constraints and rubrics.
Pass the cumulative performance examination at or above 85 percent with changed-case evidence.

includes: Risk-based repository contracts and compatible toolchains
Formatting, linting, typing, literals, dead code, tests, security, sanitizers, and docs
Local hooks, CI required checks, maintenance, and reusable templates
excludes: One universal stack presented as correct for every language

sources.title: GitHub Actions and Status Checks Documentation
sources.scope: Controls workflow events, jobs, matrices, artifacts, security, and required check integration.

sources.title: TypeScript TSConfig Reference
sources.scope: Controls strict typing, unused code checks, indexed access, and compiler gate behavior.

sources.title: Biome Linter Rules
sources.scope: Controls modern JavaScript and TypeScript formatting, correctness, accessibility, and unused-code lint examples.

sources.title: Ruff Rules
sources.scope: Controls Python linting, unused code, safe fixes, suppression review, and rule selection.

sources.title: Clang AddressSanitizer and UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer
sources.scope: Controls native-code runtime sanitizer purpose, build profiles, output, limitations, and security cautions.

competencies.statement: Define users, runtime, data sensitivity, deployment, ownership, and expected lifetime.
misconceptions: Every new repository should use the same maximum gate set.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define users, runtime, data sensitivity, deployment, ownership, and expected lifetime.

competencies.statement: Rank correctness, security, accessibility, performance, compatibility, and maintenance risks.
misconceptions: All quality dimensions deserve identical thresholds.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Rank correctness, security, accessibility, performance, compatibility, and maintenance risks.

competencies.statement: Define machine-verifiable and human-reviewed completion criteria.
misconceptions: A passing build is a complete definition of done.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define machine-verifiable and human-reviewed completion criteria.

competencies.statement: Balance detection value, feedback speed, noise, and maintenance cost.
misconceptions: Adding more tools always improves quality.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Balance detection value, feedback speed, noise, and maintenance cost.

competencies.statement: Document bounded suppressions, owners, expiry, and review evidence.
misconceptions: A disabled rule needs no explanation if CI passes.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Document bounded suppressions, owners, expiry, and review evidence.

competencies.statement: Pin supported runtime and package-manager versions with one authoritative source.
misconceptions: Latest floating versions produce reproducible builds.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Pin supported runtime and package-manager versions with one authoritative source.

competencies.statement: Commit appropriate lockfiles and verify deterministic clean installs.
misconceptions: A version range in a manifest fully locks dependencies.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Commit appropriate lockfiles and verify deterministic clean installs.

competencies.statement: Choose tools with clear ownership and minimal duplicate diagnostics.
misconceptions: Two linters finding the same issue are twice as safe.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose tools with clear ownership and minimal duplicate diagnostics.

competencies.statement: Keep one canonical config per concern and document generated files.
misconceptions: Copying defaults across files improves clarity.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep one canonical config per concern and document generated files.

competencies.statement: Test setup, build, and checks from a clean environment.
misconceptions: If setup works on the author machine it is documented correctly.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test setup, build, and checks from a clean environment.

competencies.statement: Choose a deterministic formatter and define supported file scope.
misconceptions: Formatting preferences should be enforced manually in review.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose a deterministic formatter and define supported file scope.

competencies.statement: Separate local write mode from CI check-only mode.
misconceptions: CI should silently rewrite committed code.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate local write mode from CI check-only mode.

competencies.statement: Use editor-independent whitespace, newline, and charset settings.
misconceptions: A formatter handles every non-code file and editor behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use editor-independent whitespace, newline, and charset settings.

competencies.statement: Exclude generated, vendored, fixture, and snapshot files intentionally.
misconceptions: Ignoring all large directories is safe.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Exclude generated, vendored, fixture, and snapshot files intentionally.

competencies.statement: Introduce or replace formatting with isolated reviewable migration commits.
misconceptions: A style migration should be mixed with behavioral refactoring.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Introduce or replace formatting with isolated reviewable migration commits.

competencies.statement: Start with maintained recommended rules and promote material findings to errors.
misconceptions: Recommended rules cover every repository risk.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Start with maintained recommended rules and promote material findings to errors.

competencies.statement: Enable rules for invalid control flow, unsafe APIs, promises, hooks, and accessibility as applicable.
misconceptions: Linters only enforce subjective style.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Enable rules for invalid control flow, unsafe APIs, promises, hooks, and accessibility as applicable.

competencies.statement: Set severity from failure impact and confidence rather than preference strength.
misconceptions: Every available rule should block merges.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Set severity from failure impact and confidence rather than preference strength.

competencies.statement: Keep failing and passing fixtures for important custom policy.
misconceptions: A configuration file proves the rules behave as intended.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep failing and passing fixtures for important custom policy.

competencies.statement: Review new, removed, renamed, and changed rules during tool upgrades.
misconceptions: Linter upgrades are behavior-free dependency bumps.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Review new, removed, renamed, and changed rules during tool upgrades.

competencies.statement: Enable the language or checker strict baseline and document intentional deviations.
misconceptions: Gradual typing has value only when every value is annotated.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Enable the language or checker strict baseline and document intentional deviations.

competencies.statement: Model null, missing, unknown, and unchecked indexed access explicitly.
misconceptions: Non-null assertions are equivalent to runtime checks.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Model null, missing, unknown, and unchecked indexed access explicitly.

competencies.statement: Validate files, network data, environment variables, and user input at runtime.
misconceptions: A TypeScript or Python annotation validates external data.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Validate files, network data, environment variables, and user input at runtime.

competencies.statement: Test public type contracts and intentional compile failures.
misconceptions: Runtime unit tests cover type-level regressions.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test public type contracts and intentional compile failures.

competencies.statement: Ratchet strictness without permanently exempting legacy areas.
misconceptions: A giant first-pass strict migration is the only honest approach.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Ratchet strictness without permanently exempting legacy areas.

competencies.statement: Distinguish harmless local literals from repeated domain rules, units, limits, and protocol values.
misconceptions: Every numeric or string literal must become a constant.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Distinguish harmless local literals from repeated domain rules, units, limits, and protocol values.

competencies.statement: Name stable domain values by meaning and keep them near their owning policy.
misconceptions: A global constants file improves every codebase.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Name stable domain values by meaning and keep them near their owning policy.

competencies.statement: Use enums, unions, literal types, branded values, or value objects for closed domains.
misconceptions: A plain string is sufficient for every domain state.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use enums, unions, literal types, branded values, or value objects for closed domains.

competencies.statement: Separate units, deploy-time configuration, feature flags, and code constants.
misconceptions: All values that might change belong in environment variables.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate units, deploy-time configuration, feature flags, and code constants.

competencies.statement: Test boundary values and downstream behavior instead of only constant equality.
misconceptions: A constant declaration cannot cause behavioral regressions.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test boundary values and downstream behavior instead of only constant equality.

competencies.statement: Treat unused imports, variables, parameters, private members, and exports according to language semantics.
misconceptions: Prefixing every unused value with an underscore fixes dead code.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Treat unused imports, variables, parameters, private members, and exports according to language semantics.

competencies.statement: Detect unreachable branches, impossible states, and obsolete feature paths.
misconceptions: Code is live if a text search finds its name.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Detect unreachable branches, impossible states, and obsolete feature paths.

competencies.statement: Detect unused, missing, duplicate, and undeclared dependencies.
misconceptions: A package is needed whenever it appears in a lockfile.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Detect unused, missing, duplicate, and undeclared dependencies.

competencies.statement: Account for plugins, reflection, generated entry points, and framework conventions.
misconceptions: Static analysis can see every runtime registration.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Account for plugins, reflection, generated entry points, and framework conventions.

competencies.statement: Remove dead code with tests, telemetry, deprecation, and rollback evidence proportionate to risk.
misconceptions: Deleting unused-looking code is always a harmless cleanup.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Remove dead code with tests, telemetry, deprecation, and rollback evidence proportionate to risk.

competencies.statement: Assign unit, integration, contract, browser, system, and acceptance tests to distinct risks.
misconceptions: More end-to-end tests make lower-level tests unnecessary.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Assign unit, integration, contract, browser, system, and acceptance tests to distinct risks.

competencies.statement: Test public behavior, invariants, boundaries, and failure recovery.
misconceptions: Mirroring implementation lines produces robust tests.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test public behavior, invariants, boundaries, and failure recovery.

competencies.statement: Use generated cases for algebraic properties, parser boundaries, and state invariants.
misconceptions: Property-based tests are random examples without reproducibility.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use generated cases for algebraic properties, parser boundaries, and state invariants.

competencies.statement: Use mutation analysis selectively to find assertions that do not detect behavior changes.
misconceptions: High line coverage proves assertions are meaningful.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use mutation analysis selectively to find assertions that do not detect behavior changes.

competencies.statement: Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership.
misconceptions: Retrying a flaky test converts it into a reliable gate.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership.

competencies.statement: Interpret line, branch, function, condition, and path coverage limitations.
misconceptions: One coverage percentage describes all tested behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Interpret line, branch, function, condition, and path coverage limitations.

competencies.statement: Choose global, package, and changed-code thresholds from risk and baseline.
misconceptions: A universal one-hundred-percent threshold guarantees quality.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose global, package, and changed-code thresholds from risk and baseline.

competencies.statement: Exclude generated or unreachable code with reviewed narrow rules.
misconceptions: Coverage exclusions are harmless configuration details.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Exclude generated or unreachable code with reviewed narrow rules.

competencies.statement: Prevent new untested behavior while ratcheting legacy coverage.
misconceptions: Only repository-wide coverage should gate a pull request.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Prevent new untested behavior while ratcheting legacy coverage.

competencies.statement: Pair coverage gaps with mutation, defect, and risk evidence.
misconceptions: The highest-coverage test suite is automatically best.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Pair coverage gaps with mutation, defect, and risk evidence.

competencies.statement: Prevent, detect, revoke, and remediate committed credentials and sensitive files.
misconceptions: Deleting a secret from the latest commit removes its exposure.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Prevent, detect, revoke, and remediate committed credentials and sensitive files.

competencies.statement: Scan direct and transitive dependencies and triage exploitability and reachability.
misconceptions: Every advisory requires an immediate blind major upgrade.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Scan direct and transitive dependencies and triage exploitability and reachability.

competencies.statement: Use static security analysis for data flow and dangerous patterns with reviewed queries.
misconceptions: A general linter replaces security analysis.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use static security analysis for data flow and dangerous patterns with reviewed queries.

competencies.statement: Pin and minimize CI actions, tokens, permissions, and untrusted-code exposure.
misconceptions: CI configuration is not production code.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Pin and minimize CI actions, tokens, permissions, and untrusted-code exposure.

competencies.statement: Record build provenance, checksums, signatures, and dependency inventories when risk requires.
misconceptions: A release tag proves artifact integrity.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record build provenance, checksums, signatures, and dependency inventories when risk requires.

competencies.statement: Use AddressSanitizer builds to detect memory safety defects in native code.
misconceptions: Passing ordinary tests proves memory access is safe.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use AddressSanitizer builds to detect memory safety defects in native code.

competencies.statement: Use UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer with appropriate recover or trap policy.
misconceptions: Undefined behavior always crashes without instrumentation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer with appropriate recover or trap policy.

competencies.statement: Select thread, memory, leak, race, or platform sanitizers according to risk and compatibility.
misconceptions: All sanitizers can run together in one fast build.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Select thread, memory, leak, race, or platform sanitizers according to risk and compatibility.

competencies.statement: Use runtime warnings, leak checks, fuzzing, and framework diagnostics for managed languages.
misconceptions: Sanitizers are relevant only to C and C++.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use runtime warnings, leak checks, fuzzing, and framework diagnostics for managed languages.

competencies.statement: Run expensive dynamic checks in a documented matrix with symbolized actionable output.
misconceptions: A sanitizer finding can be suppressed without root-cause review.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Run expensive dynamic checks in a documented matrix with symbolized actionable output.

competencies.statement: Test README setup and core commands from a clean environment.
misconceptions: Documentation is correct if it looks complete.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test README setup and core commands from a clean environment.

competencies.statement: Validate API schemas, generated clients, migrations, and compatibility changes.
misconceptions: Compilation catches every API compatibility break.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Validate API schemas, generated clients, migrations, and compatibility changes.

competencies.statement: Test documentation links and executable examples where practical.
misconceptions: Examples can remain stale because they are not production code.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test documentation links and executable examples where practical.

competencies.statement: Check dependency licenses, attribution, notices, and source obligations.
misconceptions: Open source dependencies have no distribution obligations.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Check dependency licenses, attribution, notices, and source obligations.

competencies.statement: Regenerate schemas, clients, docs, and fixtures and fail on unexplained diffs.
misconceptions: Generated files can be edited safely by hand.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Regenerate schemas, clients, docs, and fixtures and fail on unexplained diffs.

competencies.statement: Expose stable format, lint, type, test, and verify commands independent of tool internals.
misconceptions: Developers should memorize every underlying command.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Expose stable format, lint, type, test, and verify commands independent of tool internals.

competencies.statement: Run fast deterministic changed-file checks in local hooks and keep heavier checks elsewhere.
misconceptions: Every commit should run the complete system test matrix.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Run fast deterministic changed-file checks in local hooks and keep heavier checks elsewhere.

competencies.statement: Treat local hooks as convenience while CI remains authoritative and bypasses stay visible.
misconceptions: A local hook cannot be skipped.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Treat local hooks as convenience while CI remains authoritative and bypasses stay visible.

competencies.statement: Document exact gate commands and completion expectations in AGENTS.md or equivalent.
misconceptions: Agents infer repository verification commands reliably.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Document exact gate commands and completion expectations in AGENTS.md or equivalent.

competencies.statement: Make failures concise, reproducible locally, and linked to remediation.
misconceptions: A nonzero exit code is sufficient developer feedback.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Make failures concise, reproducible locally, and linked to remediation.

competencies.statement: Separate trusted branch workflows from untrusted pull-request code and secrets.
misconceptions: All GitHub Actions events have the same trust model.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate trusted branch workflows from untrusted pull-request code and secrets.

competencies.statement: Order cheap discriminating checks before expensive matrices while preserving useful parallelism.
misconceptions: One serial mega-job is easiest to diagnose.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Order cheap discriminating checks before expensive matrices while preserving useful parallelism.

competencies.statement: Test declared runtime, operating-system, database, and feature support intentionally.
misconceptions: Testing the newest environment implies older support.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test declared runtime, operating-system, database, and feature support intentionally.

competencies.statement: Use dependency caches and test artifacts without trusting executable output across boundaries.
misconceptions: CI caches are always safe and correct.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use dependency caches and test artifacts without trusting executable output across boundaries.

competencies.statement: Connect stable named checks to branch protection and define cancellation and rerun policy.
misconceptions: A workflow file automatically blocks unsafe merges.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Connect stable named checks to branch protection and define cancellation and rerun policy.

competencies.statement: Measure defect escape, false positives, duration, flakiness, suppression age, and developer friction.
misconceptions: More failed checks indicate a healthier repository.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Measure defect escape, false positives, duration, flakiness, suppression age, and developer friction.

competencies.statement: Schedule compatibility-tested tool and runtime upgrades with rollback paths.
misconceptions: Automatic dependency updates need no test matrix.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Schedule compatibility-tested tool and runtime upgrades with rollback paths.

competencies.statement: Raise standards gradually with changed-code gates and expiring debt records.
misconceptions: Legacy debt justifies permanent exemptions.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Raise standards gradually with changed-code gates and expiring debt records.

competencies.statement: Offer risk-based language and project profiles instead of one universal template.
misconceptions: One repository template fits libraries, CLIs, web apps, and native services.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Offer risk-based language and project profiles instead of one universal template.

competencies.statement: Defend each gate by risk, ownership, feedback time, evidence, and maintenance plan.
misconceptions: A fashionable tool list is a quality strategy.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend each gate by risk, ownership, feedback time, evidence, and maintenance plan.
